testSuites.name: Allow Scenarios
testSuites.description: Valid access patterns that should ALLOW

tests.name: Retailer Member Listing QR Campaigns
tests.description: Retailer-level user viewing campaigns in their own retailer

tests.name: SU Admin Managing Agency Configuration
tests.description: Super user with admin type accessing SU-level settings

tests.name: Agency Admin Creating QR Campaign
tests.description: Agency-level admin creating a campaign for their agency

tests.name: Agency Owner Creating a User for Child Retailer
tests.description: Agency owner creating a new user account within a child retailer

tests.name: SU Owner Managing System Configuration
tests.description: Super user with owner type accessing SU-level settings

tests.name: SU Lead Viewing Own User Profile
tests.description: SU lead user viewing and updating their own user profile

tests.name: Agency Member Viewing Child Retailer Resources
tests.description: Agency member viewing resources from a child retailer

tests.name: Retailer Owner Managing Store Settings
tests.description: Retailer owner updating store-level configuration

tests.name: Retailer Owner Accessing Own Retailer Resources
tests.description: Retailer user can access resources scoped to their retailer

tests.name: Retailer Owner Accessing Content Templates
tests.description: Retailer user accessing newly added contents product

tests.name: Retailer Member Accessing Content Assets
tests.description: Retailer member accessing content assets

tests.name: Retailer Owner Accessing Signages People
tests.description: Retailer user accessing signage product

tests.name: Retailer Member Accessing Signages Places Items
tests.description: Retailer member accessing signage places item resources

tests.name: Retailer Admin Accessing Connect Contacts
tests.description: Retailer admin accessing new connect product contacts

tests.name: Retailer Owner Accessing QR Design Settings
tests.description: Retailer owner accessing underscore-separated settings resource

tests.name: Retailer Owner Viewing QR Performance Report
tests.description: Retailer owner can view QR-related reports

tests.name: SU Admin Accessing Cerbos Policy Settings
tests.description: SU admin can access Cerbos policy configuration settings

tests.name: Retailer Owner Listing Content Channels
tests.description: Retailer owner can list content channels from the signage product

tests.name: Retailer Owner Listing CMS Collections
tests.description: Retailer owner can list collections from the cms product

tests.name: Retailer Member Viewing CMS Website Item
tests.description: Retailer member can view a cms website item within their own retailer scope

tests.name: Agency Manager Creating CMS Page
tests.description: Agency manager can create a cms page for a child retailer with cms subscription

testSuites.name: Deny Scenarios
testSuites.description: Invalid access patterns that should DENY

tests.name: Retailer Collaborator Attempting to Create
tests.description: Retail-level collaborator trying to create a resource

tests.name: Retailer Member Accessing Product Not in Subscription
tests.description: Retailer user trying to access a product they're not subscribed to

tests.name: SU Collaborator Attempting to Create Settings
tests.description: SU collaborator trying to create a system setting

tests.name: Agency Lead Attempting to Modify Settings
tests.description: Agency lead trying to update agency settings

tests.name: Agency Collaborator Attempting to Create Resource
tests.description: Agency collaborator trying to create a resource

tests.name: Retailer Lead Attempting to Modify Settings
tests.description: Retailer team lead trying to update store settings

tests.name: Retailer Owner Accessing Different Retailer Resources
tests.description: Retailer user cannot access resources from a different retailer (retailer isolation)

tests.name: Retailer Member Accessing Different Retailer Footprints
tests.description: Retailer staff cannot access footprints resources from another retailer

tests.name: Agency Member Attempting to Access Contents Without Subscription
tests.description: Agency member trying to access contents product without subscription

tests.name: Retailer Member Attempting to Modify Signages People
tests.description: Retailer collaborator cannot modify signage resources

tests.name: Retailer Collaborator Attempting to Create Content Channel
tests.description: Retailer collaborator cannot create resources, only view/list/export

tests.name: Agency Owner Attempting to Access Cerbos Settings
tests.description: Agency owner cannot access SU-only cerbos policy settings

tests.name: Retailer Without CMS Subscription Accessing CMS Collection
tests.description: Retailer owner without cms in their products list is blocked by product validation

tests.name: Retailer Collaborator Attempting to Create CMS Entry
tests.description: Retailer collaborator is read-only and cannot create cms entries

tests.name: Cross-Retailer Access to CMS Website Item
tests.description: Retailer user cannot access a cms website item belonging to a different retailer

testSuites.name: DealDesk Product Gating - Allow
testSuites.description: Per-surface product gating grants access with the correct product(s)

tests.name: SSP surface with ssp product
tests.description: Retailer with ssp can list dealdesk:ssp

tests.name: DSP-blocks with ssp product
tests.description: Retailer with ssp can view dealdesk:dsp-blocks

tests.name: Trade-ledgers with trade product
tests.description: Retailer with trade can view dealdesk:trade-ledgers

tests.name: Media-packages with trade product
tests.description: Retailer with trade can list dealdesk:media-packages (packages)

tests.name: Brands with brand_center product
tests.description: Retailer with brand_center can view dealdesk:brands

tests.name: Any-of-three campaigns via trade
tests.description: Shared campaigns surface visible with any single product (trade)

tests.name: Any-of-three campaigns via brand_center
tests.description: Shared campaigns surface visible with any single product (brand_center)

tests.name: Store-traffic via ssp
tests.description: Store-traffic visible with ssp

tests.name: Store-traffic via trade
tests.description: Store-traffic visible with trade

tests.name: Base sites without dealdesk products
tests.description: Footprint sites is base — any retailer (qr only) can list

tests.name: Base blueprints without dealdesk products
tests.description: Footprint blueprint is base — any retailer (qr only) can view

tests.name: Brand path on brands
tests.description: Brand owner with brand_center + linked retailer can view dealdesk:brands

tests.name: Retailer admin triggers provisioning sync
tests.description: retailer_manager (admin) with ssp can create dealdesk:inventory-provisioning

tests.name: Retailer owner triggers provisioning sync
tests.description: retailer_owner with ssp can create dealdesk:inventory-provisioning

tests.name: SSP-only retailer reads content tags
tests.description: retailer with only ssp can view contents:tags (extended product gate)

tests.name: Retailer admin creates taxonomy key
tests.description: retailer_manager with ssp can create contents:tags_taxonomy

tests.name: SSP update with ssp product (DD-3a)
tests.description: Retailer owner with ssp can update dealdesk:ssp (Waterfall-config save)

testSuites.name: DealDesk Product Gating - Deny
testSuites.description: Per-surface product gating denies access when the required product is absent

tests.name: SSP surface denied without ssp
tests.description: Retailer with only trade cannot list dealdesk:ssp

tests.name: Trade-ledgers denied without trade
tests.description: Retailer with only ssp cannot view dealdesk:trade-ledgers

tests.name: Brands denied without brand_center
tests.description: Retailer with only trade cannot view dealdesk:brands

tests.name: Any-of-three denied with no dealdesk product
tests.description: Retailer with only qr cannot list dealdesk:campaigns

tests.name: Store-traffic denied for brand_center-only
tests.description: brand_center does not grant store-traffic (ssp/trade only)

tests.name: DSP-blocks denied for brand_center-only retailer
tests.description: brand_center does not grant ssp surface dsp-blocks

tests.name: Retailer member cannot trigger provisioning sync
tests.description: staff_operator (member) with ssp is denied create on dealdesk:inventory-provisioning

tests.name: Retailer admin without ssp cannot provision
tests.description: retailer_manager lacking ssp is denied create on dealdesk:inventory-provisioning

tests.name: Retailer member cannot create taxonomy key
tests.description: staff_operator (member) is denied create on contents:tags_taxonomy

tests.name: Brand user cannot administer taxonomy
tests.description: brand user is denied create on contents:tags_taxonomy (brands excluded)

tests.name: SSP update denied for collaborator (DD-3a)
tests.description: guest_collaborator with ssp is read-only and cannot update dealdesk:ssp
